title: thaumastos #2298
definition:
1) wonderful, marvellous
    1a) worthy of pious admiration, admirable, excellent
    1b) passing human comprehension
    1c) causing amazement joined with terror
    1d) marvellous
        1d1) extraordinary, striking, surprising
